svg.text: Three layers of precision — from product intent to domain realization
Audience: PM, Design, Leadership | File: .prd.md | Language: Personas, Goals, Features, Metrics

g.text: As a..., I want..., so that...
What pain do they have? (Problem Statement)
What capabilities does the product offer? (Feature)
How do we measure success? (Goal + Success Metric)

svg.text: Audience: Engineers, QA, Architects | File: .req | Language: EARS patterns, Shall statements, MoSCoW

g.text: ubiq | state | event | unwanted | opt | complex
What shall the system do? (EARS statement)
Under what conditions? (While, When, If, Where clauses)
How is each obligation traced? (Satisfaction Link)
What are the gaps? (unsatisfied reqs, orphaned elements)
How do requirements relate? (depends-on, conflicts-with, decomposed-into)
Where did this come from? (source → PRD)

svg.text: Audience: Engineers, Domain Experts | File: .domain.specy | Language: DDD — Entities, Aggregates, Events, Policies
Reactive loop: Command → Operation → Event → Policy → Command

g.text: What are the domain concepts? (Entity, Aggregate, Value Type)
How do they behave? (Operation, State Machine, Command → Event)
What rules must hold? (Invariant, Policy, Precondition)
What events flow? (Internal, External, Error, Temporal)
How is it structured & how does it behave?
